news.title: Michigan kids miss a lot of school. Rural districts trying to change that
news.summary_en: Michigan has the highest rate of chronic absenteeism in the Midwest. In rural southwest Michigan, districts are using research-backed tactics to get kids in class.
news.author: Julie J. Riddle, New/Nueva Opinion

news.title: As Michigan falls further behind, some ask: Time to overhaul high school?
news.summary_en: With college readiness low and absenteeism high, education groups say Michigan is overdue for a change in high school graduation standards
news.author: Isabel Lohman
